segments.text: Side B edge cancel executed well—no endlag exposed!
segments.original_text: さあ横必殺技エッジキャンセルをうまく使って後隙を晒さない

segments.text: The uncharged shot didn't come out in time!
segments.original_text: 溜める前の発射が間に合わなかったですね
そして上必殺技で復帰したいところに合わせ

full_text: Side B edge cancel executed well—no endlag exposed! The uncharged shot didn't come out in time! Matching the up B recovery!
